title: Alex Tabarrok on the Economic Analysis of Crime
subtitle: I tell my Gary Becker story, why I like police more than prisons, how criminals are like children and more. The post Alex Tabarrok on the Economic Analysis of Crime appeared first on Marginal REVOLUTION .
contentHtml:
